name: Crock Pot Italian Chicken Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 chicken breast or thigh, boneless and skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cabbage wedges, onion, and mushrooms in a 3½ to 6 quart crockery cooker.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place frozen chicken pieces atop the vegetables.
4. Pour spaghetti sauce over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 10 to 12 hours.
6. Transfer contents to a serving platter.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
